title: AXHierarchyChartClickEvent
description: Event interface emitted when a node in the hierarchy chart is clicked, providing access to the clicked node data, DOM event, and target element

types.description: Event data for node click events

props.name: item
props.description: The data item that was clicked

props.name: element
props.description: The DOM element that was clicked

inherited.name: nativeElement
inherited.description: The root native element. Inherited from NXComponent
